title: Verify explicit apply authorization
preconditions: Current suggestion, no-suggestion, conflict, stale, selected-item, unauthorized exact-rule, and authorized exact-rule examples exist.
steps: Complete evaluation without apply; request previews for each outcome partition; request rule-wide apply with and without authority; change one fingerprint after preview.
expected: FR-CLASSIFY-APPLY-AUTHORIZATION holds: preview is read-only and exact, only current authorized suggestions enter scope, and missing authority or stale evidence blocks mutation.
